news.t: Charts Suggest Innovative Tech Stocks Are Headed Higher
3 Top Tech ETFs Set To Outperform Despite The Covid-19 Economic Slowdown

holdings.infoBox: XITK is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are AXT, Inc. stock at 6.87%, Applied Optoelectronics at 5.49%, DigitalOcean Holdings at 3.49%, Silicon Motion Technology at 2.89%, and Arm Holdings at 2.89%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR FactSet Innovative Technology ETF (XITK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FactSet Innovative Technology index. The fund tracks an index composed of US-listed technology and electronic media companies deemed innovative or disruptive by FactSet. XITK was launched on Jan 13, 2016 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Charts Suggest Innovative Tech Stocks Are Headed Higher
data.text: Innovative tech companies are providing products and services to help navigate a new way of working and staying in touch.

data.text: Technology continues to lead the markets higher. ETF expert Jim Woods, a contributor to MoneyShow.com and editor of In the Woods, highlights 3 tech funds that are well positioned for gains despite the...
